papers.title: Randomised trial of not providing booster diphtheria-tetanus-pertussis (DTP) vaccination after measles vaccination and child survival: A failed trial
papers.translated_title: 不提供麻疹疫苗接种后加强白喉-破伤风-百日咳（DTP）疫苗的随机试验与儿童生存：一项失败的试验
papers.author: Agergaard, J.
papers.summary: ABSTRACT Background In low-income settings, WHO recommended a booster-dose of DTP (DTP4) and OPV (OPV4) at 18 months of age. Previous studies found DTP after MV to be associated with higher female mortality. We conducted a randomised trial (RCTs) in Guinea-Bissau, in which children from 18 months of age were randomised to receive DTP4+OPV4 vs OPV4-only to assess the impact on survival and hospitalisations, overall and by sex. Methods The trial was conducted from 2005-2012. Children were randomised and followed from 18 months to 4 years of age. Hospitalisations were captured through a surveillance system at the main paediatric ward, and deaths were detected through a demographic surveillance system in the study area and through yearly home visits to the study participants. Data was analysed in Cox proportional hazards models with age as underlying time scale. The RCT aimed to enrol 6,000 children based on an expected annual mortality rate of 3%. During the trial period many interventions, including many national health campaigns, were carried out. Results The trial enrolled 5,960 children of which 95% (5,674) were included in the analysis. Annual non-accidental mortality rate was 0.55%, 82% lower than the expected rate. There was no difference in mortality between the randomisation groups. With 30 and 35 deaths, the hazard ratio (HR) for DTP4+OPV4 vs OPV4-only was 0.84 (95% CI=0.52-1.37); 0.86 (0.42-1.76) in males and 0.82 (0.42-1.60) in females. The HR for hospitalisations was 0.91 (0.77-1.07); 0.87 (0.70-1.09) in males; 0.96 (0.75-1.22) in females). Conclusion The study found no negative effect of DTP4 and no sex-differential effect of DTP4, but it was strongly underpowered. Furthermore, due to the large number of health interventions, not envisioned at the initiation of the trial, a limited part of the follow-up was a comparison between DTP4+OPV4 vs OPV4 as the most recent vaccinations.
papers.translated_summary: 摘要 背景 在低收入环境中，世界卫生组织建议在18月龄时接种一剂白喉-破伤风-百日咳疫苗加强针（DTP4）和口服脊髓灰质炎疫苗加强针（OPV4）。既往研究发现，麻疹疫苗接种后接种DTP与女性死亡率升高相关。我们在几内亚比绍开展了一项随机对照试验，将18月龄以上儿童随机分配至DTP4+OPV4组或仅OPV4组，以评估其对生存率和住院率的影响（总体及按性别分层）。方法 试验于2005-2012年进行。儿童被随机分组后从18月龄随访至4岁。通过主要儿科病房的监测系统记录住院情况，通过研究区域的人口监测系统及对研究参与者的年度家访检测死亡事件。数据采用以年龄为潜在时间尺度的Cox比例风险模型分析。该随机对照试验基于预期年死亡率3%计划招募6000名儿童。试验期间开展了多项干预措施，包括多次全国健康运动。结果 试验共招募5960名儿童，其中95%（5674例）纳入分析。非意外年死亡率为0.55%，较预期低82%。随机分组间死亡率无差异。DTP4+OPV4组与仅OPV4组相比，共发生30例和35例死亡，风险比为0.84（95%置信区间=0.52-1.37）；男性为0.86（0.42-1.76），女性为0.82（0.42-1.60）。住院风险比为0.91（0.77-1.07）；男性为0.87（0.70-1.09）；女性为0.96（0.75-1.22）。结论 本研究未发现DTP4的负面效应及性别差异效应，但统计效力严重不足。此外，由于试验启动时未预见到的大量健康干预措施，随访期间仅有限部分能比较DTP4+OPV4与仅OPV4作为最近接种疫苗的效果。

papers.title: Shared host-genetic architecture between gut microbiota and internalizing psychopathology
papers.translated_title: 肠道微生物群与内化精神病理学之间存在共享的宿主遗传结构
papers.author: Velez-Pardo, P.
papers.summary: Whether gut microbial composition is causally linked to mental illness, or merely correlated with it, remains unresolved. Using genetic variants as natural instruments (Mendelian randomization, MR), we tested the genetically predicted effects of 211 gut microbial taxa on nine psychiatric and psychopathology-related phenotypes, using the largest available genome-wide association studies. Across 1,898 valid tests, seven taxon-outcome associations passed false-discovery-rate correction (FDR < 0.05), and all fell on the internalizing spectrum (depression, neuroticism and insomnia) rather than on bipolar disorder or schizophrenia; they included a protective association of the Mollicutes/Tenericutes clade with depression (beta = -0.073, p = 1.5e-6) and of Butyrivibrio with neuroticism, and a deleterious association of Betaproteobacteria with neuroticism. Conservative tests tempered any per-locus causal reading: Bayesian colocalization gave PP.H4 < 0.05 at every locus and a summary-data causal test (CAUSE) found 0 of 45 taxon-outcome pairs genuinely causal; yet the direction of effect matched the protective-versus-deleterious hypothesis in 33 of 45 pairs (binomial p = 1.2e-3). Modelling the shared genetics of the nine phenotypes placed these taxa specifically on a latent internalizing factor (correlation 0.48 with a separate psychotic factor) and, in a bifactor model, on internalizing-specific genetic variance beyond a general psychopathology factor. Selected gut microbial taxa and internalizing psychopathology therefore appear to share host genetics rather than a direct microbe-to-disorder causal chain. We release the full analysis as an open resource for larger microbiome studies, brain-tissue follow-up and experimental tests of candidate mechanisms.
papers.translated_summary: 肠道微生物组成与精神疾病之间是否存在因果关系，或仅为相关性，目前尚无定论。我们利用遗传变异作为自然工具（孟德尔随机化，MR），基于现有最大规模的全基因组关联研究，检验了211个肠道微生物类群对九种精神及精神病理相关表型的遗传预测效应。在1898项有效检验中，有7项微生物类群-结局关联通过了错误发现率校正（FDR < 0.05），且全部集中于内化谱系（抑郁症、神经质和失眠），而非双相情感障碍或精神分裂症；其中包括柔膜菌纲/软壁菌门分支对抑郁症的保护性关联（beta = -0.073, p = 1.5e-6）、丁酸弧菌属对神经质的保护性关联，以及β-变形菌纲对神经质的有害关联。保守检验削弱了任何位点层面的因果推断：贝叶斯共定位分析显示所有位点的PP.H4均小于0.05，而汇总数据因果检验（CAUSE）发现45对微生物类群-结局组合中无一对存在真实因果关系；但效应方向与保护性-有害性假设在45对组合中的33对一致（二项检验p = 1.2e-3）。对九种表型共享遗传结构的建模将这些微生物类群特异性地定位于潜在内化因子（与独立的精神病性因子相关系数为0.48），而在双因子模型中，它们与超越一般精神病理因子的内化特异性遗传变异相关。因此，特定肠道微生物类群与内化精神病理学更可能共享宿主遗传背景，而非存在直接的微生物-疾病因果链。我们将完整分析作为开放资源发布，以支持更大规模的微生物组研究、脑组织追踪及候选机制的实验验证。

papers.title: European-derived coronary artery disease polygenic scores over-flag genetic risk in Vietnamese and Southeast Asian populations: a multi-score analysis in 1000 Genomes
papers.translated_title: 欧洲来源的冠心病多基因评分在越南和东南亚人群中过度标记遗传风险：一项基于1000 Genomes的多评分分析
papers.author: Hoang, Q. P.
papers.summary: Background. Polygenic scores (PRS) for coronary artery disease (CAD) are derived almost entirely from European-ancestry data. Their portability to Southeast Asian populations, including the Vietnamese, is largely uncharacterised and clinically consequential when scores are used with risk thresholds. Methods. We evaluated four independent European-derived CAD scores from the PGS Catalog (PGS000058, PGS000349, PGS002809, PGS004198; 70 - 5,723 variants) in 2,504 individuals from the 1000 Genomes Project, focusing on the Vietnamese Kinh (KHV) and Dai (CDX) samples. Per-individual scores were computed with PLINK2 and standardised. We assessed (i) the cross-ancestry distribution (calibration) and (ii) a clinically-relevant consequence: the proportion of each population flagged high genetic risk when the European top-20% threshold is applied (20% if perfectly calibrated). Results. For the primary score (PGS000058) the standardised PRS differed across super-populations (ANOVA F(4, 2499) = 121.1, p < 0.001); the Vietnamese Kinh mean was +0.47 SD above the European mean (Welch t = 7.77, p = 2.0 x 10^ -14). Applying the European top-20% high-risk threshold, the fraction of Vietnamese Kinh flagged ranged from 22.2% to 57.6% across the four scores, and of Dai from 21.5% to 43.0%, versus the intended 20%. Three of the four scores over-flagged Vietnamese (25-58%); the largest score (PGS004198) was approximately calibrated for East/Southeast Asians ([~]22%) but markedly over-flagged Africans (69.3%). Conclusions. European-derived CAD polygenic scores are inconsistently calibrated in Vietnamese and other Southeast Asian samples, and most substantially over-flag high genetic risk when a European threshold is applied. The magnitude and even the direction of miscalibration depend on the specific score, so no such score can be assumed transferable without local validation and recalibration. Distribution shift bounds, but does not by itself quantify, loss of predictive accuracy, which requires phenotyped data.
papers.translated_summary: 背景。冠状动脉疾病（CAD）的多基因评分（PRS）几乎完全基于欧洲血统数据推导而来。这些评分在包括越南人在内的东南亚人群中的可移植性尚未明确，当评分与风险阈值结合使用时，会产生临床后果。方法。我们评估了来自PGS目录（PGS000058、PGS000349、PGS002809、PGS004198；包含70至5,723个变异位点）的四个独立欧洲来源CAD评分，研究对象为千人基因组计划中的2,504名个体，重点关注越南京族（KHV）和傣族（CDX）样本。使用PLINK2计算个体评分并进行标准化。我们评估了（i）跨血统分布（校准性）以及（ii）临床相关后果：当应用欧洲前20%阈值时，各人群被标记为高遗传风险的比例（若完全校准则为20%）。结果。对于主要评分（PGS000058），标准化PRS在超级人群间存在差异（ANOVA F(4, 2499) = 121.1, p < 0.001）；越南京族均值比欧洲均值高+0.47个标准差（Welch t = 7.77, p = 2.0 x 10^-14）。应用欧洲前20%高风险阈值后，四个评分中越南京族被标记的比例范围为22.2%至57.6%，傣族为21.5%至43.0%，而预期值为20%。四个评分中有三个对越南人群过度标记（25-58%）；最大评分（PGS004198）对东亚/东南亚人群大致校准（约22%），但对非洲人群显著过度标记（69.3%）。结论。欧洲来源的CAD多基因评分在越南及其他东南亚样本中校准不一致，且应用欧洲阈值时大多显著过度标记高遗传风险。校准偏差的程度甚至方向取决于具体评分，因此未经本地验证和重新校准，不能假定任何此类评分具有可移植性。分布偏移限制了预测准确性的损失，但本身无法量化这种损失，这需要表型数据支持。

papers.title: Beyond Intensity: Cross-Dataset Consistency of Temporal Facial Action-Unit Dynamics as Transferable Markers of Depression
papers.translated_title: 超越强度：时间性面部动作单元动态的跨数据集一致性作为抑郁症的可迁移标记
papers.author: Jeong, I.
papers.summary: Facial behavior is a widely studied objective signal for depressive-symptom analysis, yet most systems are trained and evaluated within a single dataset, leaving it unclear whether the learned representations reflect depression or dataset-specific artifacts. Prior work has also relied largely on aggregate intensity statistics and on small samples. We reframe the problem by asking which facial action unit (AU) features transfer across datasets, rather than which maximize within-dataset discrimination. Using time-resolved AU dynamics in a Korean cohort of 2,608 participants, including 265 with PHQ-9-defined depressive symptoms, , recorded under happy and unhappy emotion-elicitation conditions, asking which AU features transfer across datasets rather than which maximize within-dataset discrimination. From AU time-series extracted with OpenFace, we computed 568 features spanning intensity, temporal, dynamic, peak-structure, and Duchenne (genuine smile) co-activation patterns. We then tested their directional transferability on the US DAIC-WOZ dataset, which differs in race, language, interview task, recording length, and recording setting. Within the source cohort, peak-interval features gave the strongest discriminative signal (AU26 peak-interval, Cohen's d = -0.66), yet reversed sign externally, whereas slower temporal features and AU06 (cheek raiser) preserved their direction despite modest effect sizes. Excluding peak features raised directional agreement from 56-64% to 82-90%. Within-dataset discriminative strength therefore does not predict cross-dataset transferability, supporting directional consistency as a practical criterion for selecting transferable affective-model inputs. Smile analysis further showed that depressive symptoms were marked less by reduced smiling than by eye-mouth decoupling (d = -0.41), which survived covariate adjustment and matched the voluntary-emotional facial-pathway distinction. Being low-dimensional and non-identifying, AU time series may support privacy-conscious, multi-site depression research without sharing raw video.
papers.translated_summary: 面部行为是抑郁症状分析中广泛研究的客观信号，但大多数系统仅在单一数据集内训练和评估，导致无法判断学习到的表征反映的是抑郁症状还是数据集特有的伪影。先前研究也主要依赖聚合强度统计和小样本数据。我们通过提出"哪些面部动作单元（AU）特征能在数据集间迁移"而非"哪些特征能最大化数据集内区分度"来重新定义问题。利用韩国2,608名参与者（含265名PHQ-9定义的抑郁症状者）在快乐与不快乐情绪诱发条件下记录的时间分辨AU动态特征，从OpenFace提取的AU时间序列中计算了涵盖强度、时间、动态、峰值结构和杜兴（真实微笑）共激活模式的568个特征。随后在种族、语言、访谈任务、记录时长和记录环境均不同的美国DAIC-WOZ数据集上测试其方向性迁移能力。在源队列中，峰值间隔特征提供了最强区分信号（AU26峰值间隔，Cohen's d = -0.66），但在外部数据集中方向反转；而较慢的时间特征和AU06（提颊肌）尽管效应量较小，但保持了方向一致性。排除峰值特征后，方向一致性从56-64%提升至82-90%。因此，数据集内区分强度不能预测跨数据集迁移能力，支持将方向一致性作为选择可迁移情感模型输入的实际标准。微笑分析进一步显示，抑郁症状更少表现为微笑减少，而是眼-口解耦（d = -0.41），该特征在协变量调整后依然存在，且符合自主-情绪性面部通路区分。作为低维度且非识别性特征，AU时间序列可在不共享原始视频的情况下支持注重隐私的多站点抑郁研究。

papers.title: Mammography Access, Urbanicity, and Late-Stage Breast Cancer Burden Across Texas: A Bayesian Spatial Analysis
papers.translated_title: 德克萨斯州乳腺X线摄影可及性、城市化程度与晚期乳腺癌负担：一项贝叶斯空间分析
papers.author: Gao, J.
papers.summary: Background Geographic disparities in access to preventive healthcare services remain an important contributor to breast cancer inequities in the United States. Mammography screening plays a critical role in early detection and improved survival; however, screening infrastructure and healthcare accessibility remain unevenly distributed across many regions, particularly within large and socioeconomically diverse states such as Texas. Understanding the spatial relationships among mammography access, urbanicity, socioeconomic vulnerability, and late-stage breast cancer burden is important for developing geographically targeted public health interventions. Methods This study integrated multiple county-level datasets, including mammography facility locations from the Texas Cancer Information database, late-stage breast cancer burden data from the National Cancer Institute, and socioeconomic indicators from census-derived datasets and the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention Social Vulnerability Index. Geographic information systems (GIS), spatial autocorrelation analyses, and Bayesian spatial epidemiologic methods were used to evaluate geographic patterns across Texas counties from 2018 to 2022. Global and local Moran's I statistics were calculated to assess spatial clustering patterns. Bayesian spatial Poisson conditional autoregressive (CAR) regression models were subsequently estimated to examine associations between mammography center density, population density, female socioeconomic characteristics, and late-stage breast cancer burden while accounting for residual spatial dependence. Results Significant positive spatial autocorrelation was observed for county-level late-stage breast cancer burden across Texas counties. Mammography facilities were heavily concentrated within major metropolitan regions, while many rural counties demonstrated comparatively limited screening infrastructure availability. Bayesian spatial regression analyses demonstrated that log-transformed population density was significantly inversely associated with the burden of late-stage breast cancer ({beta} = -0.136, 95% CrI [-0.175, -0.103]), indicating that less densely populated counties experienced greater burden than more urbanized counties. Mammography center density showed a borderline inverse association with late-stage burden ({beta} = -0.008, 95% CrI [-0.017, 0.002]), suggesting that greater availability of screening infrastructure may contribute to reduced burden. Persistent residual spatial dependence remained across counties ({rho} = 0.472, 95% CrI [0.038, 0.919]), indicating ongoing geographic clustering beyond measured explanatory variables. Conclusions Substantial geographic disparities in late-stage breast cancer burden, mammography access, and socioeconomic vulnerability exist across Texas counties. The findings suggest that urbanicity and screening infrastructure availability play important roles in shaping geographic inequities in breast cancer outcomes. Public health interventions should move beyond increasing facility availability alone and instead incorporate geographically targeted strategies that address rural healthcare access limitations, healthcare infrastructure disparities, and broader structural barriers to preventive screening services.
papers.translated_summary: 背景 预防性医疗服务获取的地理差异仍是美国乳腺癌不平等的重要成因。乳腺X线摄影筛查对早期发现和提高生存率至关重要，但筛查基础设施和医疗可及性在许多地区分布不均，尤其是在德克萨斯州这样面积广阔且社会经济多样化的州。理解乳腺X线摄影可及性、城市化程度、社会经济脆弱性与晚期乳腺癌负担之间的空间关系，对于制定地理靶向的公共卫生干预措施具有重要意义。 方法 本研究整合了多个县级数据集，包括德克萨斯州癌症信息数据库中的乳腺X线摄影设施位置、国家癌症研究所的晚期乳腺癌负担数据，以及人口普查衍生数据集和疾病控制与预防中心社会脆弱性指数中的社会经济指标。采用地理信息系统、空间自相关分析和贝叶斯空间流行病学方法，评估2018至2022年德克萨斯州各县的地理模式。计算全局和局部Moran's I统计量以评估空间聚类模式。随后估计贝叶斯空间泊松条件自回归回归模型，在考虑残差空间依赖性的同时，检验乳腺X线摄影中心密度、人口密度、女性社会经济特征与晚期乳腺癌负担之间的关联。 结果 德克萨斯州县级晚期乳腺癌负担存在显著的正向空间自相关。乳腺X线摄影设施高度集中于主要大都市区域，而许多农村县的筛查基础设施可及性相对有限。贝叶斯空间回归分析显示，对数转换后的人口密度与晚期乳腺癌负担呈显著负相关（β = -0.136，95% CrI [-0.175, -0.103]），表明人口密度较低的县比城市化程度更高的县负担更重。乳腺X线摄影中心密度与晚期负担呈边缘性负相关（β = -0.008，95% CrI [-0.017, 0.002]），提示筛查基础设施的可及性增加可能有助于减轻负担。各县之间存在持续的残差空间依赖性（ρ = 0.472，95% CrI [0.038, 0.919]），表明在已测量的解释变量之外仍存在地理聚类。 结论 德克萨斯州各县在晚期乳腺癌负担、乳腺X线摄影可及性和社会经济脆弱性方面存在显著的地理差异。研究结果表明，城市化程度和筛查基础设施可及性在形成乳腺癌结局的地理不平等中发挥重要作用。公共卫生干预措施不应仅局限于增加设施可及性，而应纳入地理靶向策略，解决农村医疗可及性限制、医疗基础设施差异以及预防性筛查服务的更广泛结构性障碍。

papers.title: Acetate, a fibre-derived gut metabolite, is associated with reduced cardiovascular disease risk in females with early menopause
papers.translated_title: 醋酸盐，一种源自纤维的肠道代谢物，与早期绝经女性心血管疾病风险降低相关。
papers.author: Yang, C.
papers.summary: Background and Aims: Estrogen deficiency and testosterone excess substantially increase cardiovascular disease risk in females. Dietary fibre and its microbial by-products, short-chain fatty acids, have cardioprotective effects. We aim to investigate whether plasma acetate - the most abundant short-chain fatty acid - is associated with improved cardiovascular outcomes in females with altered sex hormone profiles. Methods: This cohort study included 105,563 female participants from the UK Biobank and Biobank Japan with up to 10 years of follow-up. The primary outcome was major adverse cardiovascular event (MACE) in relation to early menopause (surrogate for estrogen insufficiency) and plasma free testosterone. Proteomics profiling explored underlying molecular pathways. Results: Higher plasma acetate was associated with lower 10-year MACE incidence (HR=0.887, p=0.002) in the UK Biobank. Acetate levels above the median attenuated the high MACE risk associated with early menopause (HR=1.155, p=0.075) compared with lower acetate levels (HR=1.431, p<0.001), further supported by a negative early menopause x acetate interaction on MACE incidence (HR=0.894, p=0.037). This mitigation pattern was replicated in Biobank Japan (above median: HR=1.350, p=0.067; below median: HR=1.423, p=0.028). The top acetate quartile (>27.1g fibre/day) attenuated the early menopause-associated MACE risk. Proteomics implicated the underrepresentation of pro-inflammatory pathways. High acetate also attenuated MACE risk associated with elevated free testosterone, although the interaction term was not significant. Conclusions: Higher plasma acetate mitigated cardiovascular risk in females, particularly in those with early menopause, potentially by modulating pro-inflammatory pathways. These findings support recommendations for higher dietary fibre intake as a CVD prevention strategy for females with early menopause.
papers.translated_summary: 背景与目的：雌激素缺乏和睾酮过量会显著增加女性心血管疾病风险。膳食纤维及其微生物代谢产物短链脂肪酸具有心脏保护作用。本研究旨在探究血浆乙酸（含量最丰富的短链脂肪酸）是否与性激素谱异常女性的心血管结局改善相关。方法：本队列研究纳入英国生物银行和日本生物银行105,563名女性参与者，随访时间最长10年。主要结局指标为重大不良心血管事件（MACE）与早绝经（雌激素不足替代指标）及血浆游离睾酮的关联。通过蛋白质组学分析探索潜在分子机制。结果：在英国生物银行中，高血浆乙酸与10年MACE发生率降低相关（HR=0.887，p=0.002）。与低乙酸水平组（HR=1.431，p<0.001）相比，乙酸水平高于中位数的女性中早绝经相关MACE高风险被减弱（HR=1.155，p=0.075），早绝经×乙酸对MACE发生率的负交互作用进一步支持该结果（HR=0.894，p=0.037）。该缓解模式在日本生物银行中得到验证（高于中位数：HR=1.350，p=0.067；低于中位数：HR=1.423，p=0.028）。乙酸最高四分位组（>27.1克纤维/天）减弱了早绝经相关MACE风险。蛋白质组学提示促炎通路表达下调。高乙酸也减弱了游离睾酮升高相关的MACE风险，但交互项未达统计学显著性。结论：高血浆乙酸可降低女性心血管风险，尤其在早绝经女性中，其机制可能涉及促炎通路调节。这些发现支持将增加膳食纤维摄入作为早绝经女性心血管疾病预防策略的建议。

papers.title: Host-related concordance of TAC/SARIFA in colorectal double and triple carcinomas suggests patient-specific metabolic reprogramming
papers.translated_title: 结直肠双原发癌和三原发癌中TAC/SARIFA的宿主相关一致性提示患者特异性代谢重编程
papers.author: Farfan Lopez, F. J.
papers.summary: Introduction. TAC/SARIFA has been introduced as a new robust and easy-to-evaluate biomarker in several cancer entities, including colorectal cancer. It is defined by direct contact between at least five tumour cells and one adipocyte and is believed to indicate metabolic reprogramming associated with adverse outcome. However, the mechanism that leads to TAC/SARIFA positivity remains unclear. To investigate whether there is an individual component, we conducted a study on double and triple cancers, establishing a within patient design. Methods. We retrospectively analysed a total of 135 cases with 276 colorectal cancers from two academic medical centres. The TAC/SARIFA status was evaluated, as were the basic histopathological factors. The median follow-up time was 120 months. Results. Cases with any TAC/SARIFA positive tumours showed significantly reduced overall survival (62 vs. 88 months; p = 0.011). Analysing the entire cohort, the rates of concordant and discordant cases followed a random distribution. However, restricting the analysis to synchronous pT3/4 cases revealed a significant deviation from a random distribution (p = 0.016). Conclusion. This study reveals significant concordance of TAC/SARIFA status in synchronous locally advanced colorectal double/triple carcinomas, supporting the concept that tumour adipocyte interaction reflects a host related microenvironmental condition linked to metabolic reprogramming rather than a purely tumour intrinsic event.
papers.translated_summary: 引言。TAC/SARIFA已被引入作为多种癌症实体（包括结直肠癌）中一种新型稳健且易于评估的生物标志物。其定义为至少五个肿瘤细胞与一个脂肪细胞直接接触，被认为指示与不良预后相关的代谢重编程。然而，导致TAC/SARIFA阳性的机制仍不明确。为探究是否存在个体因素，我们针对双原发癌和三原发癌开展了一项研究，建立了患者自身对照设计。方法。我们回顾性分析了来自两个学术医疗中心的135例病例（共276个结直肠癌）。评估了TAC/SARIFA状态及基础组织病理学因素。中位随访时间为120个月。结果。存在任何TAC/SARIFA阳性肿瘤的病例总生存期显著缩短（62个月 vs. 88个月；p = 0.011）。分析整个队列时，一致与不一致病例的比例呈随机分布。然而，将分析限定于同时性pT3/4期病例后，发现其显著偏离随机分布（p = 0.016）。结论。本研究表明，在同时性局部晚期结直肠双原发/三原发癌中，TAC/SARIFA状态存在显著一致性，支持肿瘤-脂肪细胞相互作用反映的是与代谢重编程相关的宿主微环境条件，而非纯粹的肿瘤内在事件。

papers.title: FreqFuseNet: Resolving Feature-Scale Mismatch in Dual-Frequency Fusion for Thin-Wall Head-and-Neck OAR Segmentation
papers.translated_title: FreqFuseNet：解决双频融合中特征尺度不匹配问题以实现薄壁头颈部OAR分割
papers.author: Chen, W.-Y.
papers.summary: Accurate segmentation of thin-wall organs-at-risk (OARs)-the cochlea, vestibular semicircular canals, internal auditory canal, tympanic cavity, and middle ear-is clinically relevant for head-and-neck radiotherapy planning, yet these small, thin-wall structures remain among the most challenging targets for automated delineation. Dual-frequency feature fusion is a promising direction for boundary-sensitive representation, but under the investigated FP16 FFT-FcaNet setting, we observe an approximately 863-fold activation-scale mismatch between the FFT and FcaNet branches, causing a nominal 5 percent residual coefficient to behave as an approximately 43-fold dominant term. We propose FreqFuseNet, which resolves this mismatch by normalizing the FcaNet branch to the FFT activation scale before residual injection with a fixed low-amplitude coefficient (beta = 0.05), restoring beta as an interpretable 5 percent residual-amplitude coefficient relative to the FFT feature scale. Under a controlled binary per-OAR ROI protocol on the SegRap2023 head-and-neck CT benchmark across 10 clinically prioritized thin-wall OARs, FreqFuseNet achieves Dice of 0.849, HD95 of 0.824 mm, and SDice@1mm of 0.959 in the primary seed, with comparable performance in an independent second seed (Dice 0.843, HD95 0.823 mm). FreqFuseNet yields statistically significant case-level aggregate improvements over 3D U-Net and MedNeXt-S (Wilcoxon p < 0.01 and p < 0.05, respectively), using only 29.7 million parameters versus 414.6 million for the full wavelet baseline.
papers.translated_summary: 在头颈部放疗计划中，精确分割薄壁危及器官（OARs）——耳蜗、前庭半规管、内耳道、鼓室及中耳——具有临床相关性，但这些细小薄壁结构仍是自动勾画最具挑战性的目标之一。双频特征融合是边界敏感表征的一个有前景方向，但在所研究的FP16 FFT-FcaNet设置下，我们观察到FFT分支与FcaNet分支之间存在约863倍的激活尺度失配，导致名义上5%的残差系数实际表现为约43倍的支配项。我们提出FreqFuseNet，通过将FcaNet分支归一化至FFT激活尺度，再以固定低幅系数（beta=0.05）注入残差，从而解决该失配问题，使beta恢复为相对于FFT特征尺度的可解释5%残差幅度系数。在SegRap2023头颈部CT基准测试中，针对10个临床优先的薄壁OARs，采用受控的每OAR二元ROI协议，FreqFuseNet在主要种子中达到Dice 0.849、HD95 0.824毫米、SDice@1mm 0.959，在独立第二种子中表现相当（Dice 0.843、HD95 0.823毫米）。FreqFuseNet在病例级聚合指标上显著优于3D U-Net和MedNeXt-S（Wilcoxon检验p<0.01和p<0.05），且仅使用2970万参数，而完整小波基线为4.146亿参数。

papers.title: Malaria burden and care in hard-to-reach indigenous communities in the Peruvian Amazon during the COVID-19 pandemic: A mixed-methods study
papers.translated_title: COVID-19疫情期间秘鲁亚马逊偏远土著社区的疟疾负担与护理：一项混合方法研究
papers.author: Fernandez, S. P.
papers.summary: Background The COVID-19 pandemic was associated with reported disruptions to healthcare delivery and malaria control activities in remote, malaria-endemic indigenous communities with limited access to healthcare. Remote indigenous communities in the Peruvian Amazon may have been especially vulnerable due to interruptions in malaria surveillance, diagnosis, and treatment. We investigated the impact of the COVID-19 pandemic on malaria burden, healthcare access, and community perceptions in hard-to-reach indigenous communities in the Amazonas region of Peru. In malaria-endemic regions, these lessons are particularly important because future health emergencies may similarly affect surveillance, diagnosis, prevention, and treatment activities, potentially reversing gains achieved through malaria control programs. Methods A convergent parallel mixed-methods study was conducted in 2021 and 2022 across four indigenous communities in the Rio Santiago district, Amazonas region, Peru. Quantitative data were collected through cross-sectional malaria surveys, and qualitative data were obtained through semi-structured interviews with inhabitants, community health workers, and local health personnel. Malaria infections were detected by microscopy and confirmed by PCR. Factors associated with the occurrence of malaria infection were studied based on a generalized estimating equation (GEE) approach applied to clustered binary outcome data and accounting for repeated observations within participants across study years. Qualitative data were analyzed thematically, and both components were integrated using the Pillar Integration Process framework. Results A total of 514 participants were included. PCR-based malaria prevalence was 17.6% in 2021 and 26.09% in 2022. P. falciparum prevalence was particularly high in the Alianza Progreso community (2021: 24.19%, 2022: 16.16%) compared to the other studied communities. Previous malaria infection and chills were associated with PCR-confirmed malaria infection. Qualitative findings indicated that COVID-19-related disruptions affected malaria control activities by interrupting diagnosis and treatment availability, reducing community follow-up, and prioritizing COVID-19 response activities over malaria control. Participants also described fear of COVID-19, temporary migration to farm areas, and reliance on herbal medicine during the pandemic. Conclusions The COVID-19 pandemic may have contributed to exacerbated pre-existing challenges to malaria control in remote indigenous communities in the Peruvian Amazon. Strengthening malaria surveillance, ensuring continuity of diagnosis and treatment, and improving healthcare access in geographically isolated communities will be critical to supporting malaria elimination efforts in Peru.
papers.translated_summary: 背景 COVID-19疫情与偏远、疟疾流行且医疗资源有限的土著社区中医疗服务和疟疾控制活动中断的报告相关。秘鲁亚马逊地区的偏远土著社区因疟疾监测、诊断和治疗中断而可能尤为脆弱。我们调查了COVID-19疫情对秘鲁亚马逊地区难以到达的土著社区疟疾负担、医疗可及性和社区认知的影响。在疟疾流行地区，这些经验尤为重要，因为未来的卫生紧急情况可能同样影响监测、诊断、预防和治疗活动，可能逆转通过疟疾控制项目取得的成果。 方法 2021年至2022年，在秘鲁亚马逊地区圣地亚哥河区的四个土著社区开展了一项并行混合方法研究。通过横断面疟疾调查收集定量数据，并通过半结构化访谈收集居民、社区卫生工作者和当地卫生人员的定性数据。疟疾感染通过显微镜检测并通过PCR确认。基于广义估计方程（GEE）方法，对聚类二元结果数据进行分析，并考虑研究年份内参与者的重复观察，研究疟疾感染的相关因素。定性数据按主题分析，并通过支柱整合过程框架整合两部分内容。 结果 共纳入514名参与者。基于PCR的疟疾患病率在2021年为17.6%，2022年为26.09%。与其他研究社区相比，Alianza Progreso社区的恶性疟原虫患病率特别高（2021年：24.19%，2022年：16.16%）。既往疟疾感染和寒战与PCR确诊的疟疾感染相关。定性研究结果表明，COVID-19相关的中断通过中断诊断和治疗的可及性、减少社区随访以及优先处理COVID-19应对活动而非疟疾控制，影响了疟疾控制活动。参与者还描述了疫情期间对COVID-19的恐惧、临时迁移至农田区域以及依赖草药治疗的情况。 结论 COVID-19疫情可能加剧了秘鲁亚马逊偏远土著社区疟疾控制中已有的挑战。加强疟疾监测、确保诊断和治疗的连续性、改善地理隔离社区的医疗可及性，对于支持秘鲁的疟疾消除工作至关重要。

papers.title: Anti-HBsAg antibody mAb19-LS enhances antiviral immunity in humans with chronic hepatitis B
papers.translated_title: 抗HBsAg抗体mAb19-LS增强慢性乙型肝炎患者的抗病毒免疫
papers.author: Wang, Z.
papers.summary: Chronic infection with hepatitis B virus (HBV) is characterized by persistent expression of hepatitis B surface antigen (HBsAg), which is associated with profound immune tolerance. Although nucleos(t)ide analogue therapy effectively suppresses viral replication, it neither eliminates HBV nor reverses virus-specific immune dysfunction. Here, we report the results of two parallel first-in-human, dose-escalation studies evaluating a single infusion of mAb19-LS, a long-acting IgG1 monoclonal antibody targeting HBsAg, in individuals with chronic HBV infection receiving nucleos(t)ide analogue therapy. mAb19-LS was generally safe and well tolerated and induced a mean 11-fold increase in antigen clearance. The magnitude and duration of HBsAg suppression were dependent on both baseline antigen levels and mAb19-LS dose, with suppression maintained for more than 36 weeks in individuals receiving the highest dose. Reduction of circulating HBsAg was associated with uptake of HBsAg-IgG immune complexes by monocytes and dendritic cells and inflammatory reprogramming of these antigen-presenting cells. Notably, proliferation of both CD4+ and CD8+ T cells, as well as interferon-{gamma}; and TNF-; production in response to HBV antigens, were significantly increased 24 weeks after infusion. Together, these findings demonstrate that mAb19-LS is generally safe and effectively accelerates HBsAg clearance while activating antigen presenting cells and enhancing antiviral T cell responses.
papers.translated_summary: 慢性乙型肝炎病毒（HBV）感染的特征是乙型肝炎表面抗原（HBsAg）持续表达，这与深度免疫耐受相关。尽管核苷（酸）类似物治疗能有效抑制病毒复制，但既不能清除HBV，也无法逆转病毒特异性免疫功能障碍。本文报告了两项平行、首次人体剂量递增研究的结果，评估单次输注靶向HBsAg的长效IgG1单克隆抗体mAb19-LS对接受核苷（酸）类似物治疗的慢性HBV感染者的效果。mAb19-LS总体安全且耐受性良好，诱导抗原清除率平均提升11倍。HBsAg抑制的幅度和持续时间取决于基线抗原水平及mAb19-LS剂量，最高剂量组受试者的抑制效果维持超过36周。循环HBsAg的减少与单核细胞和树突状细胞摄取HBsAg-IgG免疫复合物相关，并伴随这些抗原呈递细胞的炎症重编程。值得注意的是，输注24周后，CD4+和CD8+ T细胞的增殖以及针对HBV抗原的干扰素-γ和肿瘤坏死因子-α产生均显著增加。这些发现表明，mAb19-LS总体安全，能有效加速HBsAg清除，同时激活抗原呈递细胞并增强抗病毒T细胞应答。
